name: Senso-ji Temple
description: Ancient Buddhist temple in Asakusa. Rich history, iconic giant red thunder gate lantern, historic shopping street Nakamise-dori with traditional snacks.

name: Tokyo Skytree
description: Massive broadcasting and observation tower. Panoramic views of the city skyline, futuristic architecture, modern shopping mall at the base.

name: Meiji Jingu Shrine
description: Shinto shrine dedicated to Emperor Meiji. Located in a massive, dense forested park area. Peaceful walking paths, traditional torii gates.

name: Takeshita Street Harajuku
description: Vibrant, crowded pedestrian shopping street known for quirky youth fashion, cosplay culture, colorful crêpes, and trendy pop culture shops.

name: Shibuya Crossing & Hachiko
description: The world famous scramble crossing. High-energy urban environment, massive neon video screens, nightlife bars, and the historic Hachiko dog statue.

name: Shinjuku Gyoen National Garden
description: Large traditional landscape garden blending Japanese, English, and French styles. Scenic ponds, cherry blossoms, peaceful teahouses.

name: Robot Restaurant District
description: Flashy, high-intensity nightlife district in Kabukicho with bright neon lights, music clubs, arcade lounges, and chaotic evening entertainment.

name: Tsukiji Outer Market
description: Traditional bustling street market packed with fresh seafood vendors, sushi counters, kitchenware stalls, and experiential street food dining.
